class.name: CassieSolverParams
class.description: Thresholds and weights controlling the greedy KKT solver: fidelity vs constraint balance, proximity tolerances, and feature gates such as planarity.

members.member: Angle in radians within which the solver treats two tangent directions as parallel for alignment and ortho-snap purposes.
Minimum chord distance between adjacent control anchors. Subdivisions closer than this are merged.
Blend between fidelity (1.0) and constraint-energy (0.0) in the greedy outer-loop objective. Lower values favor constraint satisfaction.
When [code]true[/code], the solver tries to fit a plane through the control points and add a planarity soft constraint when the fit residual is below [member proximity_threshold].
Distance under which the solver considers two positions coincident. Used for planarity detection and constraint normalization.
Weight of the fidelity term for control-point position displacement.
Weight of the fidelity term for inter-anchor tangent variation.
